title: Autumn Birch
description:
Autumn Leaves for birch trees.
Giving you the right feels for the season!
body:
**A Fall Transformation for Your Minecraft World**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd1ea79a58c844f8e57bd09fbd02c3608b7bbca8_0.webp)

Breathe life into your Minecraft landscapes with the Autumn Birch Trees resource pack!
This pack gives birch trees a seasonal makeover, turning their leaves into beautiful shades of warm orange.

Perfect for those who love the cozy, crisp feeling of autumn, these vibrant trees will make your forests glow with the colors of fall.

Whether you're exploring or building in seasonal worlds, Autumn Birch Trees adds the perfect touch of autumn charm, creating a picturesque and immersive fall experience in your game!

[![DONATE](https://i.imgur.com/sw61xfJ.png)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/azturax)

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
